name: recall_smoke
description: Small keyword-distinct fixture: a fast retrieval-pipeline regression gate (runs on the stub embedder, no network). Real semantic numbers come from fastembed/LongMemEval runs.

documents.text: PostgreSQL connection pooling with pgbouncer for production database workloads
the Rust borrow checker enforces ownership and lifetimes at compile time
Kubernetes pods are scheduled onto nodes by the kube-scheduler control loop
OAuth2 authorization code flow exchanges a code for an access token and a refresh token
regular expressions match patterns using anchors, character classes, and quantifiers
the TCP three-way handshake uses SYN, SYN-ACK, and ACK to establish a connection
garbage collection reclaims unreachable heap memory using mark-and-sweep or generational strategies
a Merkle tree hashes data blocks into a root so tampering with any block changes the root
the Raft consensus algorithm elects a leader and replicates a log across follower nodes
a Bloom filter is a probabilistic set with false positives but no false negatives

queries.query: pgbouncer connection pooling for postgres databases
rust ownership lifetimes and the borrow checker
kubernetes pod scheduling onto nodes by the scheduler
oauth2 authorization code access token refresh
regex anchors character classes and quantifiers
tcp syn ack three-way handshake to establish a connection
mark and sweep generational heap garbage collection
merkle tree root hash for tamper detection of blocks
raft consensus leader election and log replication
bloom filter probabilistic set false positives
